p5.post: more thoroughly reviewed, the resulting litigation could have been avoided entirely.
p5.zh: 若收購提案當初經過更徹底的審查，隨之而來的訴訟本可完全避免。
p5.why: 本題考假設語氣倒裝的被動結構。「Had + 主詞 + been + 過去分詞」是 if 子句省略 if 後的倒裝形式，等同於「If the acquisition proposal had been more thoroughly reviewed」。空格填入 been，與後方 reviewed 共同構成過去完成被動語態。be（原形）和 to be（不定詞）不符合倒裝句型；being 為現在分詞，無法與 Had 構成完成被動結構。

p5.post: to a non-disclosure agreement, the former executive was prohibited from disclosing the terms of the settlement.
p5.zh: 受到保密協議的約束，這位前主管被禁止透露和解條款。
p5.why: 主句主詞「the former executive」與動詞 bind 是被動關係（該主管被協議約束），因此分詞構句應使用過去分詞 Bound，等同於 Being bound 的省略。Binding 為主動現在分詞，暗示主詞主動束縛他人，語意矛盾；To bind 為不定詞，不作分詞構句；Having bound 表示主動完成，亦不符被動語意。分辨主詞與動詞的主被動關係是本題關鍵。

p5.tag: 非限定關係子句（介系詞前置）
p5.pre: The merger agreement, a copy of
p5.post: has been submitted to the regulatory authority, stipulates a 90-day transition period.
p5.zh: 合併協議已將一份副本提交監管機關，協議本身規定了九十天的過渡期。
p5.why: 本題考介系詞 + 關係代名詞的非限定子句結構。「a copy of which」中，which 代指 the merger agreement，整個片語等同於「of which a copy」的前置形式。非限定關係子句（逗號內嵌）只能用 which，不可用 that；what 是複合關係代名詞，不充當關係代名詞；it 無法引導子句。此句型常見於法律與正式商務書面英文。

p5.pre: The indemnification clause shall remain in full force and effect
p5.post: any subsequent modification to the underlying contract.
p5.zh: 無論對基礎合約做出任何後續修改，賠償條款均應繼續完全有效。
p5.why: notwithstanding 是正式法律英文中的讓步介系詞，意為「儘管、不論」，可直接接名詞片語，且可後置於主句之後（postpositive use）。despite of 是常見錯誤用法（despite 後不加 of）；although 為連接詞，後接完整子句而非名詞片語；nevertheless 是轉折副詞，不引導名詞片語。掌握 notwithstanding 的介系詞用法是高階法律商務英文的必備能力。

p5.pre: Whether the proposed merger will satisfy antitrust requirements
p5.post: to be determined by the commission before the end of the fiscal quarter.
p5.zh: 擬議中的合併是否符合反壟斷要求，仍有待委員會在本財務季度結束前作出裁定。
p5.why: 由 whether 引導的名詞子句整體作主詞，視為單數，謂語動詞須用三人稱單數形式 remains。remain 為複數動詞原形，錯誤；are 為複數 be 動詞，亦錯；being 是分詞，不能單獨作謂語。「remains to be determined」是正式書面語的慣用句型，意為「仍有待確定」，為高階商務英文的重要表達。

p6.title: Memorandum Regarding the Implementation of Enhanced Data Governance Protocols
seg: Following an extensive internal audit, significant deficiencies in our current data management infrastructure

by the External Review Committee. Effective July 1, 2026, all divisions are required to adopt the revised Data Governance Framework (DGF), the details of which are outlined in the accompanying policy document.

the implementation timeline may appear compressed, the Leadership Team is confident that adequate resources have been allocated to facilitate a seamless transition. Department heads are urged to designate a Data Compliance Liaison within their respective teams no later than June 30.
across all regional offices throughout the month of July. Attendance is mandatory for all personnel with access to client records or proprietary data.
Queries pertaining to the new framework should be directed to the Compliance Helpdesk at compliance@company.com. Your cooperation in this matter is greatly appreciated.

blanks.zh: 在完成一次廣泛的內部稽核後，外部審查委員會已發現我們目前資料管理基礎架構中存在重大缺失。
blanks.why: 空格後接「by the External Review Committee」，明確需要被動語態。稽核結果與當前情況直接相關，應使用現在完成被動式「have been identified」。「were identifying」為過去進行主動，語態錯誤；「had identified」是主動過去完成式，主詞不符；「are to identify」表示義務，語意不合。

blanks.zh: 儘管實施時程看似緊湊，領導團隊確信已分配足夠資源以促進順利過渡。
blanks.why: 前半句提出「時程看似緊湊」的讓步，後半句卻肯定「已分配足夠資源」，形成讓步轉折關係，須用讓步連接詞 While（相當於 Although）。Therefore 和 Consequently 表示因果，與語意相反；Furthermore 表示遞進，不表讓步，均不符語篇邏輯。

blanks.zh: 培訓課程將於七月份在所有地區辦公室舉行。
blanks.why: 「conduct training sessions」是正式英文中描述「舉辦／進行培訓」的標準搭配（conduct = carry out formally）。constituted 意為「構成」；conveyed 意為「傳達訊息」；contracted 意為「締結契約或縮減」，三者與 training sessions 的動詞搭配（collocation）均不符。

opts: Employees who fail to complete the required training by July 31 will be subject to a temporary suspension of data access privileges.
The inaugural data audit was first commissioned in fiscal year 2019 as part of a broader modernization initiative.
The company has partnered with three external vendors to supply updated data management software.
All office supplies requisitions should continue to be submitted through the standard procurement portal.
blanks.zh: 未能在七月三十一日前完成規定培訓的員工，將被暫停資料存取權限。
blanks.why: 前文指出培訓對特定人員屬強制出席，緊接著最合乎邏輯的是說明未遵守的後果，以強化政策執行力道。選項 A 補充強制政策的執行機制，語篇連貫性最強。選項 B 提及歷史背景，與段落脈絡脫節；選項 C 關於軟體供應商，主題轉換突兀；選項 D 關於辦公用品採購，完全偏離主題。
